title: Moroccan Cod Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with cod, robust and light spices, and traditional moroccan harira. Serve with a side of crusty bread.
instructions: Rinse the cod and pat dry with paper towels.
Heat a large pot over medium heat.
Add the robust, light, and moroccan spices, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the harira and 4 cups of water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the cod to the pot, cover, and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
